display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（同容器交互与思维链隔离测试版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: restores hint-driven hidden content inside the same container even when hover handlers are stripped and the host lacks cursor:pointer, while blocking interaction-rescue transient full-message rerenders for sources that still contain thinking, analysis, reasoning, or thought envelopes.
